---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detector, attack, report type, or evaluation metric
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which module does this belong in?**

**What problem does this solve?**

**Proposed approach**
If you have a specific algorithm/paper/technique in mind, link it.

**Does this require external data or a GPU?**
This repo keeps everything CPU-only with locally generated data by design — if your
proposal needs either, explain the tradeoff and any offline fallback you'd suggest.
